patterns.description: Override server INI keys from the runtime Server INI. Use INI_Key=Value or INI_Section__Key=Value.
Override Lua files. Use LUA_<file>__Path where Path uses _ as separators and __ for a literal underscore.

env_vars.name: ADMINPASSWORD
env_vars.description: Admin password for first setup; updates INI_Password if changed.

env_vars.name: CLEAN_WORKSHOP
env_vars.description: Clean unused workshop content for resolved WORKSHOP_IDS.

env_vars.name: DISABLE_ANTICHEAT
env_vars.description: Disable AntiCheatProtectionType entries by index or ranges.

env_vars.name: FORCESTEAMCLIENTSOUPDATE
env_vars.description: Update steamclient.so in the server installation before launch.

env_vars.name: FORCEUPDATE
env_vars.description: Force update the server before launch.

env_vars.name: INI_LOAD
env_vars.description: Load INI_ overrides from environment using apply_ini_vars.sh.

env_vars.name: LUA_LOAD
env_vars.description: Load Lua overrides from environment using apply_lua_vars.sh.

env_vars.name: MAP_SCAN_VERBOSE
env_vars.description: Verbose output while scanning workshop maps.

env_vars.name: MOD_IDS
env_vars.description: Mod IDs for the server; replaces INI_Mods.

env_vars.name: SERVERPRESET
env_vars.description: Preset name for SandboxVars; copies preset on first run or when SERVERPRESETREPLACE is true.

env_vars.name: WORKSHOP_IDS
env_vars.description: Workshop IDs and collections; replaces INI_WorkshopItems.

env_vars.name: ARGS_JAVA
env_vars.description: Builds JVM arguments for server launch.
